name: Ratatouille- Topped Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chicken breasts by boning and skinning them.
2. Heat a nonstick skillet with olive oil. Add onions, garlic, peppers, and eggplant. Sauté for 10 minutes until soft.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (tomatoes, squash, zucchini, oregano, and pepper) to the skillet. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
5. Brown the chicken breasts in the skillet sprayed with olive oil cooking spray for about 3 minutes on each side. Place them in a baking dish and keep warm.
6. Cover the chicken with the sauce, cover with foil, and bake for 15 minutes.
7. Serve over your favorite pasta. For a vegetarian dish, omit the chicken and serve over rice or pasta.
